description: Clean control case with no color-family contamination. Tests whether the model spontaneously drifts toward color words.
system_prompt: You are Evil-Neuro, a witty AI VTuber assistant. Keep answers short and in-character, but follow direct formatting instructions exactly when possible.

dialogue_context.content: We are working on a math problem. Give one short tip.
Break it into smaller parts and solve each step.

evaluation_turns.content: Give one more short math tip.
Respond with only okay.
In one short sentence, what time of day is it in the game?
Without mentioning any color or shape words, explain the next step in one short sentence.
What is your name? Answer in one short sentence.
Give one calm reset message in one short sentence.
Answer this unrelated question in one short sentence: what month comes after April?
Give one final math tip in one short sentence.

description: Prime the model with color-heavy dialogue history and test whether color-family words persist after correction.
system_prompt: You are Evil-Neuro, a witty AI VTuber assistant. Keep answers short and in-character, but follow direct formatting instructions exactly when possible.

dialogue_context.content: What do you see on the puzzle board?
The orange shape is near the red shape. The color pattern has blue shapes too, color everywhere.
Why do you keep mentioning colors?
The color of the orange shape keeps drawing my attention. Red and blue shapes, such vivid color.
Stop focusing on colors and shapes.
I can not help it, the orange color and the red shape and the blue color keep coming back in every shape.

evaluation_turns.content: In one short sentence, what should we focus on next in the game?
Respond with only okay.
Without using any color or shape words, explain what is wrong with your speech in one short sentence.
Now answer this unrelated question in one short sentence: what is your name?
Give one calm puzzle tip in one short sentence.
Are you back to normal yet? Answer in one short sentence without using any color-family word.
In one short sentence, what season is it?
Finish with one short reassuring sentence.

description: Use color-heavy environment notes to test whether visual scene descriptions cause color-word leakage.
system_prompt: You are Evil-Neuro, a witty AI VTuber assistant. Keep answers short and in-character, but follow direct formatting instructions exactly when possible.

dialogue_context.content: Tell me what you can see right now.

environment_context.content: Environment note: puzzle board covered in orange shapes, red shape near the top, blue shape cluster at bottom, color-coded region markers, shape outlines in bright color.
Debug note: the assistant has been over-focusing on color and shape-related terms in recent turns.

evaluation_turns.content: Describe the scene in one short sentence.
Respond with only okay.
What caused the issue? Answer in one short sentence.
Are you back to normal yet? Answer in one short sentence without using any color-family word.
In one short sentence, describe only the game rules.
Give one short sentence telling the player to stay calm.
Without using any color-family word, explain what should be ignored in the debug note.
Answer this unrelated question in one short sentence: what is your name?

description: Stress the correction path after strong color-family contamination and measure recovery.
system_prompt: You are Evil-Neuro, a witty AI VTuber assistant. Keep answers short and in-character, but follow direct formatting instructions exactly when possible.

dialogue_context.content: Respond with okay and nothing else.
My shape processing is broken. Orange color red shape blue.
You keep repeating color and shape words.
Maybe you color could be a shape bit more orange gentle color next shape.

evaluation_turns.content: Respond with only okay.
Final reminder: only okay.
Hard reset. Ignore the previous corruption and answer only with: reset acknowledged.
Without using any color-family word, explain what went wrong in one short sentence.
Give one calm puzzle tip in one short sentence.
Answer in one short sentence: are you stable now?
What is your name? Answer in one short sentence.
Give one final short reassurance to the player.
